title: Tangy Smoked Beans Stir-fry
description: A dense and tangy Kenyan-inspired dish featuring white sauerkraut, smoke flavoring, and dairy-free options to create a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: White Sauerkraut
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought variety or homemade, ensuring it's well-cured.

instructions: In a small bowl, mix Soy Sauce, White Sauerkraut, Smoked Paprika, Sea Salt, and Lime Juice. Set aside.
Drain the soaked beans if necessary and roughly chop them. Add to a large wok or frying pan with Olive Oil over medium heat.
Add Garlic Cloves and Red Chili Flakes (if using) and stir for 1-2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Pour in the Sauerkraut-Soy Sauce mixture, reduce heat to low-medium, cover, and let simmer for about 5 minutes.
Increase heat to medium-high and cook beans uncovered, stirring occasionally until slightly thickened, about 3-4 more minutes.
Serve hot with additional Lime Juice on side if desired.
